headline: Dental Equipment & Technology Stocks Q4 Recap: Benchmarking Align Technology (NASDAQ:ALGN)
summary: The end of an earnings season can be a great time to discover new stocks and assess how companies are handling the current business environment. Let’s take a look at how Align Technology (NASDAQ:ALGN) and the rest of the dental equipment & technology stocks fared in Q4.

headline: How Align’s Removal from the FTSE All-World Index Will Impact Align Technology (ALGN) Investors
summary: In March 2026, Align Technology, Inc. was removed from the FTSE All-World Index, ending its inclusion in one of the broad global equity benchmarks tracked by many institutional investors. This index removal can prompt mechanical selling by index-tracking funds and may reshape how both passive and active investors view Align’s role in global portfolios. Next, we’ll examine how Align’s exit from the FTSE All-World Index could influence its investment narrative and perceived long-term...
